component.name: Study Bible
component.summary: Multi-version Bible reader with study tools and cross-device sync

description.p: Study Bible is a cross-platform Bible study app: a multi-version reader with integrated commentaries, dictionaries, and a full set of personal study tools — all offline-first, with optional zero-cost cross-device sync.

ul.li: Multi-version reader with parallel panels, verse-by-verse and flowing paragraph views, and highlights
Integrated commentaries and multi-dictionary search with tap-a-word lookup
Study tools: journals, prayer tracker, sermon builder, reading-plan generator, notes, and bookmarks
Progress dashboard with reading coverage, pace, achievements, and time analytics
Content manager to install bibles, commentaries, and dictionaries (ph4.org catalog, OSIS and MyBible import)
Cross-device sync of your highlights, notes, journals, and progress via a synced folder (e.g. Syncthing)

description.p: Cross-platform Study Bible with reader, study tools, dashboard, content manager, and folder-based sync.
